login.heading: Sign in to your account
login.footer: No passwords. Each sign-in asks for a code by email.

screens.dashboard_desc: The KPI dashboard is coming in a future update.
screens.activity_desc: Price-change history is coming in a future update.

records.empty_desc: Share a portal URL to Nidokey from the Add tab.
records.soon_desc: The “{{type}}” type will be available soon.

matches.empty_desc: When you have repeated entries (e.g. several editions of the same book), they'll appear here to merge.
matches.cross_language_flag: Different language — confirm it's the same
matches.merge_message: One entry is kept and the rest are removed ({{count}}). Status and your notes are preserved.
matches.merge_message_cross: They look like the same {{singular}} in different languages. Merge into one? The rest are removed ({{count}}). Status and your notes are preserved.

catsettings.order_help: Press and hold a category and drag to reorder · tap the eye to hide or show it.
catsettings.start_help: Which category the app opens with (only the available ones).
catsettings.reset_message: Category order and visibility, the start category, the theme and your manual record order will return to defaults. No record is deleted.

importar.heading: Add {{type}}
importar.soon_desc: You'll soon be able to track {{type}} in Nidokey.
importar.wizard_hint: Pick a destination and dates; you'll see accommodation and transport with prices to build your trip.
importar.verification_hint: If a verification appears, you'll see it automatically.
importar.how_property_steps:
1. Open a listing in Chrome
2. Tap Share → Nidokey
3. The URL will appear here automatically
importar.how_symbol: Type the symbol (e.g. BTC) and tap Add. Nidokey will fetch its price and track its evolution.
importar.hint_job: Pick the sources (InfoJobs, LinkedIn, Indeed) and type the role and/or the city or area. You can leave the role empty and search everything in that area. Tap Search and pick an offer to save it to your Jobs.
importar.hint_book:
Search by title, author, ISBN or keyword (e.g. “sapiens”, “Yuval Harari”, “9780099590088”), tap Search and pick the book from the list to save it to your Books.

Note: not all apps share well with Nidokey (the Amazon app, for example, opens a new window and doesn't add the book). If that happens, copy the link or title and search here.
importar.hint_market: Type the name or ticker (e.g. “sxr8”, “apple”, “vaneck space”) and pick the right one from the list — with its exchange. No suffixes or collisions.
importar.manual_toggle: Not showing up? Add it manually
importar.no_covers: No covers found; you can save it without an image.
importar.err_empty_listing: Couldn't read the listing data. The portal may be blocking the read; open the listing in the browser and share it again, or try once more.
importar.ok_book_added_pick: ✅ {{title}} added. Not the right one? pick below.
importar.err_book_not_identified: I couldn't identify the book. Search below by title/author/ISBN or add it manually.
